splash.title: Little World
splash.subtitle: Calm stories, one page at a time

ageGate.heading: Who is using this device?
ageGate.desc: We ask once to keep things safe. Your answer is saved on the device only.
ageGate.adultSub: A parent or guardian setting up

privacy.heading: What we promise
privacy.desc: Built for kids. Reviewed against COPPA. Nothing leaves the device unless a grown-up signs in.

policy.noTrackingBody: We do not collect, sell, or share personal information. Your child's usage stays on this device.
policy.noAdsBody: Little World is fully ad-free and will never show third-party advertising.
policy.parentalBody: Subscriptions require a verified grown-up email. Parents can cancel any time from their app store.
policy.contactBody: Questions? Reach the team at hello@littleworld.app — we reply within two working days.

storyList.heading: Stories for you
storyList.emptyText: No stories yet. Check back soon!

paywall.heroSub: 20+ stories · audio narration · new each week
paywall.benefitStoriesDesc: 20+ premium stories with new ones every week
paywall.benefitAudioDesc: Calm, slow voice for every page
paywall.benefitThemesDesc: More gentle color sets to choose from
paywall.pricingNote: First week free · cancel any time

parentGate.heading: A grown-up needs to confirm
parentGate.desc: We'll email a link to verify. The subscription only starts once they tap it.
parentGate.label: Parent email
parentGate.hint: We never share or sell email addresses.

grownupGate.subtitle: This area is for parents.
grownupGate.heading: Tap the answer
grownupGate.footerNote: We ask a small question so children don't open the parent area by mistake.

parentDashboard.subHello: Here's how this week is going.
parentDashboard.lockedDesc: Insights help you see how reading time is going. Available with Premium.
parentDashboard.privacyNote: All reading data stays on this device. We never share it.
